sectionSubtitle: Research projects demonstrating analytical and financial skills.

entries.title: MSME Sector Financial & Economic Analysis 2024
entries.description: Analyzed the contribution of MSMEs toward employment generation, GDP growth, and economic development in India. Evaluated government initiatives, financing challenges, and the role of MSMEs in entrepreneurship and regional development using research-based financial and economic analysis.
highlights: Studied the contribution of MSMEs toward employment generation, GDP growth, and industrial development in Indial development in India
Analyzed the role of MSMEs in entrepreneurship development and regional economic growth
Reviewed government policies, financial support mechanisms, and challenges affecting MSME growth
Conducted research using financial and economic data from reports, publications, and government sources

entries.title: CSR Financial Performance Analysis – Reliance Industries Ltd 2021
entries.description: Comprehensive analysis of CSR spending patterns and compliance for Reliance Industries Limited.
highlights: Analyzed 5 years of CSR expenditure data from annual reports
Evaluated compliance with Section 135 of Companies Act, 2013
Performed ratio analysis and trend identification
Identified key focus areas and spending patterns
